title: The Merry Wives of Windsor
pairs: Who wrote The Merry Wives of Windsor?
The Merry Wives of Windsor was written by William Shakespeare.
What genre is The Merry Wives of Windsor?
The Merry Wives of Windsor is a comedy by William Shakespeare.
What kind of play is The Merry Wives of Windsor?
The Merry Wives of Windsor is a Shakespeare comedy.
Where is The Merry Wives of Windsor set?
The Merry Wives of Windsor is set in Windsor, England.
